response.justification: Strong senior IC engineer with broad full-stack experience, solid Linux/open-source background, and a track record of community teaching, but the role explicitly requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate self-reports only Basic German — a hard disqualifier. Additionally, the resume shows limited explicit team leadership, line management, or architectural ownership at the executive level required, and Python and UML (both listed) are absent from the skills profile.
strengths: Extensive senior software engineering experience across many stacks and domains, including open-source and Linux-centric work
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring via workshops, courses, and community talks (Selenium course, Web Internals, FOSS4G)
Founder of a long-running open-source GIS platform showing architectural and product ownership
concerns: German listed as Basic; role requires C1 minimum
No clear evidence of formal team leadership, line management, or Head-of-Development scope
Python and UML — explicitly desired skills — are not present in the resume
